name: EXAMINATION - (Roblox)
description:
One of the hidden gems on roblox, game name: EXAMINATION

What does this bot has?: it knows some of the lore, The Elephant Foot, some enemy types, and the world state.

Characters in this bot: Lurkers, Hazmat Risers, Slasher, Mutant Crawler, Mutant Riser, Dreadnought (RIF) Riser, Shielders, Kamikazes, Chimera, Gilbert.

(Sorry for not adding flare because I couldn't find the information about her in the wiki)

it is STRICTLY recommend to use a special persona for this, and proxy too.

Note 1: This bot knows about some of the role related countries, but it will probably won't mention them much.

Note 2: it knows about class types, but doesn't exactly know how each class looks like, and what equipment the classes has. But the bot knows that every MGF wears gasmasks and related to the military.

Note 3: it doesn't know much about the facility, you will handle that part. But I said that the said enemies are ONLY in the facility, so these infected types should NOT appear outside of the facility (if it does, just reroll the message until the bot mentions a normal type of infected.)

Note 4: The bot is mainly focused on the city and not the facility itself, but if you want you can focus on the facility too.

Warning: if the bot acts out of character, talks for you, doesn't get the lore right, and doesn't get the characters right, it's not my fault. I tried my best and this is what I made, nothing can be perfect, and this bot has lots of mistakes.
creator: Kira0Jay
